name: Hoisin Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Peanut butter or Black bean paste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the soy sauce, peanut butter/black bean paste, honey/molasses, white vinegar, garlic powder, sesame seed oil, and hot pepper sauce.
2. Stir until well mixed. Taste and adjust the seasoning by adding more of any ingredient to suit your preference (e.g., saltier for meat dishes, sweeter for Dim Sum).
3. Allow the mixture to rest for a few minutes before using. Resting does not significantly change the flavor but can help the ingredients meld together slightly.
